settings.name: Gowrishopanan Siveswaran
settings.title: Software Engineering Student
settings.subTitle: SAAS, WEB & DEEP LEARNING DEVELOPER
settings.bio: I am an ambitious Software Engineering student with a solid foundation in Java, C++, and JavaScript, complemented by practical experience in web application development. I am seeking an IT Intern position where I can apply my technical knowledge, gain hands-on experience, and contribute to the success of IT projects. With strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and a collaborative mindset, I am eager to support IT teams in developing, maintaining, and optimizing software solutions while enhancing my professional expertise.

projects.title: LipReadAI
projects.subtitle: Real-Time Lip Reading & Speech Recognition (Final Year Research)
projects.description: A real-time deep learning system that converts silent lip movements into readable text in real time. Designed to help people with hearing or speech impairments by using raw video input, extracting facial/lip landmarks, and predicting sentences using a neural network trained on massive datasets (GRID, LRW, LRS3).
details: Programming Language: Python
Frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, MediaPipe, ONNX Runtime
Libraries: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Dlib, Scikit-learn
Interface Development: Streamlit, Flask, React
Hardware: GPU-accelerated environment (Google Colab / NVIDIA CUDA)

projects.title: Online E-commerce Platform
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack Web Application (Real Client Work)
projects.description: Developed a full-stack e-commerce system featuring OTP verification, Cloudinary media storage, custom e-mail alerts for order confirmations, and a highly responsive Tailwind CSS user interface.
details: Developed full-stack e-commerce platform using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js
Designed modern, mobile-responsive UI using Tailwind CSS
Implemented OTP verification for secure user registration
Integrated Cloudinary for media uploads and asset management
Integrated email alerts for automated order confirmations

projects.title: Hotel Reservation System
projects.subtitle: SLIIT 2nd Year 2nd Semester Project
projects.description: A responsive and robust hotel room booking system with real-time room availability, secure user login, booking confirmation, and email alerts.
details: Developed a full-stack hotel reservation system using MERN stack
Designed clean and intuitive UI using Tailwind CSS
Implemented real-time room availability updates and user booking logs
Integrated secure password hashing and JWT authentication

projects.title: Musical Instrument Store
projects.subtitle: SLIIT 2nd Year 1st Semester Project
projects.description: A web-based musical instrument shopping application built in Java, featuring shopping cart functionality, user auth, and complete order management workflows.
details: Developed web-based musical instrument store using Java for backend development
Implemented secure user authentication and session management
Created dynamic shopping cart and customer order checkout flow
Utilized Relational Database for product and user data storage

projects.title: Online Salon Booking System
projects.subtitle: SLIIT 1st Year 2nd Semester Project
projects.description: A web-based salon appointment scheduling platform featuring service browsing, slot reservation, and an admin dashboard to manage salon schedules.
details: Developed custom PHP-based reservation backend using MySQL database storage
Implemented scheduling engine preventing duplicate slot booking
Created administrative dashboard for salon operators to manage appointments

education.degree: BSc (Hons) in Computer and Information Systems
education.description: Focused on advanced systems engineering, full-stack architectures, and AI deep learning research (LipReadAI).

education.degree: BSc (Hons) in Information Technology Specialized in Software Engineering
education.institution: Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT)
education.description: Graduated with Higher Diploma in Information Technology. Excellent grades in OOP, Design Patterns, Java/MERN web development, and software testing.

details: Working on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning projects at SLT Digital Lab.
Developing and experimenting with ML models to solve real-world telecom problems.
Collaborating with senior engineers on AI-driven solutions and data pipelines.
Analysing business data to generate meaningful insights and reports.
Working with datasets to identify trends and support data-driven decision making.
Creating dashboards and visualisations to present findings to stakeholders.
